---
title: "FitMetrics Report"
output:
  pagedown::html_paged:
    css: "report.css"
params:
  identity: NULL
  final: NULL
  ai_history: NULL
---
<!-- This RMD file is used to define the HTML document structure and content being exported in app.R -->

```{r setup, include=FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}
# LOAD REQUIRED LIBRARIES (install if missing)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(htmltools)

#define plot settings
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.retina = 2,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 4.75,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.asp = NULL,
  fig.keep = "high",
  fig.lp = "fig:",
  dpi = 120,
  out.extra = 'style="max-width: 100%; height: auto; overflow: visible;"'
)

# Define Operator
`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a)) a else b

# Helper: format output in the AI chat box (replicated from app.R)
format_ai_markdown <- function(md_text) {
  
  #initial check if the text exists in the chat box
  if (is.null(md_text) || md_text == "")
    return("")
  
  #split all lines individually 
  lines <- unlist(strsplit(md_text, "\n", fixed = TRUE))
  
  # ====================================================
  # Process non-table lines
  # ====================================================
  # Track previous line marker type and depth (to be used in normalize_line below)
  prev_type <- NULL
  prev_depth <- 0
  
  # Helper for treating multiple indentation levels
  normalize_line <- function(line) {
    # List items
    if (grepl("^\\s*([-*]|\\d+\\.)\\s+", line)) {
      # Start list item on new line
      if (!is.null(prev_type)) line <- paste0("\n", line)
      prev_type <<- "list"
      line
    } else {
      # Non-list lines: ensure each ends with a newline for proper paragraph separation
      prev_type <<- NULL
      paste0(line, "\n")
    }
  }
  
  # ====================================================
  # Detect table blocks and build an HTML table
  # ====================================================
  in_table <- FALSE
  table_buffer <- character(0)
  processed_lines <- character(0)
  
  #Helper to build table
  flush_table <- function(buffer) {
    if (length(buffer) < 2)
      return("")
    if (grepl("^\\|?\\s*-{3,}", buffer[2]))
      buffer <- buffer[-2]
    
    # Build HTML rows
    rows <- lapply(buffer, function(row) {
      cells <- strsplit(gsub("^\\||\\|$", "", row), "\\|")[[1]]
      cells <- trimws(cells)
      cells_html <- sapply(cells, function(cell) {
        html <- commonmark::markdown_html(cell)
        gsub("^<p>|</p>\n?$", "", html)
      })
      paste0("<td>", cells_html, "</td>", collapse = "")
    })
    
    row_html <- sapply(rows, function(r)
      paste0("<tr>", r, "</tr>"))
    
    paste0(
      "<div class='ai-md-table-wrapper'>",
      "<table class='ai-md-table'>",
      paste(row_html, collapse = ""),
      "</table>",
      "</div>"
    )
    
  }
  
  # ====================================================
  # process all lines (table and non-table)
  # ====================================================
  for (line in lines) {
    if (grepl("^\\|", line)) {
      table_buffer <- c(table_buffer, line)
      in_table <- TRUE
    } else {
      
      if (in_table) {
        processed_lines <- c(
          processed_lines,
          flush_table(table_buffer),
          "<br>"   # <-- force one blank line after table
        )
        
        table_buffer <- character(0)
        in_table <- FALSE
      }
      processed_lines <- c(processed_lines, normalize_line(line))
    }
  }
  
  # Flush table if file ends with a table
  if (in_table)
    processed_lines <- c(
      processed_lines,
      flush_table(table_buffer),
      "<br>"   # <-- force one blank line after table
    )
  
  # Rebuild text for final output
  md_text <- paste(processed_lines, collapse = "\n")
  md_text <- gsub("\\n{3,}", "\n\n", md_text, perl = TRUE)
  
  # Convert Markdown to HTML 
  html <- commonmark::markdown_html(md_text)
  htmltools::HTML(html)
}

```

```{r report-header, results='asis', echo=FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}
#Header formatting
header_div <- tags$div(
  style = "margin-bottom: 1.5em; line-height: 1.2;",
  
  # Main title in the same blue as h1 in your CSS
  tags$h1("🥇 FitMetrics Report", style = "margin-bottom:0.3em; font-weight: 700; font-size: 2em; color: #1B4F72;"),
  
  # Subtitle with bold labels, same shade of blue, small bottom border
  tags$div(
    HTML(
      paste0(
        "<b>Report Date:</b> ",
        Sys.Date(),
        " &nbsp; | &nbsp; ",
        "<b>User Identity:</b> ",
        params$identity %||% "N/A"
      )
    ),
    style = paste(
      "font-size: 0.9em;",
      "color: #1B4F72;",
      "border-bottom: 2px solid #D6EAF8;",
      # same as h1 border
      "padding-bottom: 4px;"
    )
  )
)

HTML(as.character(header_div))

```

# Overview

```{r overview-cards, results='asis', echo=FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}
header_data <- c(
  params$final$Stats$Profile$Header_Info,
  params$final$Stats$Current_Week$Header_Info
)

for (col in names(header_data)) {
  cat(as.character(tags$div(
    class = "overview-card",
    tags$div(class = "card-title", gsub("_", " ", col)),
    tags$div(class = "card-value", header_data[[col]][1])
  )))
}
```

# Insights {.page-break}

## Current Week

```{r insights-current, results='asis', echo=FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}
insights_list <- params$final$Insights$Current_Week

for (section_name in names(insights_list)) {
  statements <- insights_list[[section_name]][insights_list[[section_name]] != ""]
  div_content <- tags$div(
    class = "insight-group",
    tags$div(section_name, class = "subheading"),
    lapply(statements, function(s) {
      lines <- strsplit(s, "\\s*\\|\\s*")[[1]]
      lapply(lines, function(line)
        tags$p(line, class = "insight-line"))
    })
  )
  cat(as.character(div_content))
}
```

## Profile

```{r insights-profile, results='asis', echo=FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}
insights_list <- params$final$Insights$Profile

for (section_name in names(insights_list)) {
  statements <- insights_list[[section_name]][insights_list[[section_name]] != ""]
  div_content <- tags$div(
    class = "insight-group",
    tags$div(section_name, class = "subheading"),
    lapply(statements, function(s) {
      lines <- strsplit(s, "\\s*\\|\\s*")[[1]]
      lapply(lines, function(line)
        tags$p(line, class = "insight-line"))
    })
  )
  cat(as.character(div_content))
}
```

# Stats {.page-break}

## Current Week

```{r stats-current, results='asis', echo=FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}
stats <- params$final$Stats$Current_Week

for (section in names(stats)) {
  if (section != "Header_Info") {
    df <- stats[[section]]
    cat(as.character(tags$h3(section)))
    for (col in names(df)) {
      cat(as.character(tags$div(
        class = "overview-card",
        tags$div(class = "card-title", gsub("_", " ", col)),
        tags$div(class = "card-value", df[[col]][1])
      )))
    }
  }
}
```

## Profile

```{r stats-profile, results='asis', echo=FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}
stats <- params$final$Stats$Profile

for (section in names(stats)) {
  if (section != "Header_Info") {
    df <- stats[[section]]
    cat(as.character(tags$h3(section)))
    for (col in names(df)) {
      cat(as.character(tags$div(
        class = "overview-card",
        tags$div(class = "card-title", gsub("_", " ", col)),
        tags$div(class = "card-value", df[[col]][1])
      )))
    }
  }
}
```
 
# Plots {.page-break}

```{r plots, echo=FALSE, results='asis', warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}
plots_list <- params$final$Plots$Profile
plot_names <- names(plots_list)

for (i in seq_along(plot_names)) {
  pn <- plot_names[i]
  p <- plots_list[[pn]]
  
  # Subset data to last 12 weeks
  df_filtered <- p$data
  last_12_weeks <- tail(sort(unique(df_filtered$Week_Start)), 12)
  df_filtered <- df_filtered[df_filtered$Week_Start %in% last_12_weeks, ]
  p$data <- df_filtered   # Replace the plot's data with the filtered data
  p <- p + scale_x_date(limits = range(last_12_weeks))   # restrict x-axis scale
  
  # Store the original caption
  plot_caption <- p$labels$caption
  
  # Nullify the original caption so it doesn't render
  p$labels$caption <- NULL
  
  # Remove original caption and reduce bottom margin
  p <- p +
    theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 2, r = 2, b = 0, l = 2))  # small margin around plot

  # Apply page-break only if NOT the first plot
  div_class <- if (i == 1) "plot-container" else "plot-container page-break"
  
  # Plot title
  cat(as.character(tags$div(class = div_class, tags$h3(pn))))
  
  # Render the plot
  suppressWarnings(suppressMessages(print(p)))
  
  # Print custom caption div
  if (!is.null(plot_caption)) {
    
    # Replace bullet points and line breaks for HTML
    caption_html <- gsub("•", "&bull;", plot_caption)
    caption_html <- gsub("\n", "<br>", caption_html)
    
    cat(as.character(tags$div(
      class = "plot-note",
      style = "color:#999999; font-style:italic; font-size:0.85em; margin-top:2px;",
      HTML(caption_html)
    )))
  }
}
```


# AI Coach {.page-break}

```{r ai, echo=FALSE, results='asis', warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}
conv <- params$ai_history

if (length(conv) > 0) {
  conv_div <- tags$div(style = "font-family: monospace; line-height: 1.4em; margin-bottom: 1em;", lapply(conv, function(msg) {
    tagList(
      # User prompt
      tags$p(style = "color:#1B4F72; white-space: pre-wrap;", paste0("💬 You: ", msg$prompt)),
      
      # AI response, processed via format_ai_markdown
      tags$div(class = "ai-message", HTML(
        paste0("🧠 FitMetrics AI (", msg$model, "): ", format_ai_markdown(msg$response))
      ))
    )
  }))
  
  HTML(as.character(conv_div))
  
} else {
  HTML("<p><i>No AI conversation recorded.</i></p>")
}

```
